title: cleome strigosa
intro: Cleome strigosa, also known as the bee spark, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. Cleome strigosa is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
